Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Have you signed the petition to rescind GBC resolution 311?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2008-06-13 · 6 answers
Ive already written my 2 cents over here:

http://www.gopala.org/node/229

This may not even be helpful but, since it seems to be the only organized effort for us to have a say in the matter, please sign this petition:

http://www.petitiononline.com/GBCre311/petition.html

From Prabhupuc0u257 da Lilamrita:

u346 ru299 la Prabhupu257 da became very angry and denounced the "rascal Sanskrit scholars." "A little learning," he said "is dangerous. Immediately they think they have become big scholar, thinking, "I shall arrange! And then they write all nonsense." He continued speaking about the mistake for half an hour. He was disturbed. He ordered Tamu257 la Ku7771 u7779 u7751 a to write at once to the BBT and stop these speculations by his disciples-changing his books in the name of editing The devotees were startled to see Prabhupu257 da so angry; he was supposed to be peacefully relishing a u346 ru299 mad-Bhu257 gavatam reading here in his garden.

Such a change was very serious, he said, because it changed the meaning. "Even if the authorized u257 cu257 ryas would make a mistake," he said, "it would not be changed. This is u257 ru7779 a-prayoga. In this way the u257 cu257 ryas are honored."

By u346 ru299 la Prabhupu257 das strong reaction to this one printed mistake, he was again stressing the great importance of his books. "Whatever I have wanted to say," he explained, "I have said in my books. If I live, I will say something little more. If you want to know me, read my books."
user [19] · 2008-06-17
I have been reading the comments and they are very interesting.

a few of them

Deena Bandhu dasa, Vrindavan, HDG A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupada
With all due respects to the GBC, this resolution will tear apart the fabric of our Wonderful ISKCON Community. No one will ever be able to get everyone to agree on who should do the annotations nor what the content should be. If someone has a problem, then write your own commentaries and see if anyone will buy them or distribute them, but leave Srila Prabhupadas sacred books As They Are! Let the controversies play out on the internet, but dont pollute Srila Prabhupadas books!

Howard (Hayagriva das)-A.C. Bhaktivedanta Prabhupada
Whatever I have edited is the final word. I do not want any other editors or any other comments.

Name: Wascally Wascal
Address: Ivory Tower
Guru: My mind
Comment: Im collecting all of the names on this petition and placing everyone here on a blacklist. See if any of you do-gooders will ever make it on the GBC after this!!!! HA!!!

user [19] · 2008-06-20
641. Fred Cohen ?? I just like signing petitions. Whats this one about?

644. Avinas Chandra das Manila (Philippines) ACBSP It could be rather like that, that present ISKCON is under pressure to be taken seriously by other helpful important global orgs and all this book changes are meant to signal that present ISKCON is a fully new structured independent movement managed 100\% by intelligent leaders of Hebrew ancestry and like other global orgs, fighting additionally for the cause of Israels global predominance. In that sense it could be understood that ISKCON leaders who are presently all proprietors of Israeli passports see themselves in that tight spot to be accepted and supported to survive as global org whos fully dependent upon cooperation with other powerful global players who are also 99.9\% mainly Israel centered. Prabhupada would have surely understood that point, that sometimes political clever moves are required to gain dominance. In fact Prabhupada mentions the importance of the ongoing globalization movement in his preface of SB. But still changing of books should be avoided.
